title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 20 lines).
summary_text: Findings: - High: [auto-push-after-commit.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L27) decides commit success by grepping `stdout` only, then [auto-push-after-commit.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L39) unconditionally runs `git push`. A failed `git commit` reported via exit code or `stderr` can still publish the previous `HEAD`, and it creates an implicit external-publish path from a local commit. - High: the new telemetry/artifact files expose internal task history and operational metadata, e.g. [1b7879ed73d85c56b5ec2b09.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.project-os/artifacts/kernel-task-completion/1b7879ed73d85c56b5ec2b09.json#L11) and [experience.jsonl](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/experience.jsonl#L1). These include prompts, summaries, session IDs, paths, and dispatch tokens; they are privacy-sensitive and very commit-noisy. - Medium: [freee-client.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-client.mjs#L155) now hard-fails unless `FREEE_CLIENT_ID` and `FREEE_CLIENT_SECRET` are present in env or macOS Keychain. The previous flow still let `freee-mcp` run with its own existing auth state, so this is a compatibility regression and effectively adds a macOS-specific dependency. - Medium: [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L332) removed the old prose/CJK skip while [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L374) still treats remaining lines as binaries. Japanese explanatory lines inside valid ```bash blocks will now be flagged as `PHANTOM_CMD`, causing false negatives in skill evaluation. - Medium: [gha-node24-migrate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/scripts/gha-node24-migrate.sh#L132) suppresses `stash`/`pull --rebase`/`stash pop` failures with `|| true`, then still [commits and pushes](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/scripts/gha-node24-migrate.sh#L136). That can leave a partially restored worktree or publish on top of unresolved local-state problems. No hardcoded secrets stood out in the executable hunks, but I would avoid committing the generated `experience.jsonl`, `golden-store`, `correction-pairs`, and `.project-os` artifacts without an explicit retention policy.
